title: ANNOUNCEMENT ABOUT MAXIMUM PERIOD OF STUDY
content:
ANNOUNCEMENT ABOUT MAXIMUM PERIOD OF STUDY

Dear Students,

Senior undergraduate students who have reached the maximum period of study will be granted the right to take additional examinations for the courses they have failed at the end of the Fall Semester of the 2025–2026 Academic Year. Relevant students are required to apply to the Student Affairs Office with the application form by

.

Please

click to download

the relevant form.
